name: CM_PICKER_HORIZONTAL_SEL
description: Horizontal scrolling picker with centered selection item. Supports two modes: single selection (no checkbox) and multiple selection (with checkboxes). Large text (49px) for items, smooth 300ms scroll animation. Optional title at top. Centered item is focused/selected.
visualForm: Horizontal picker: optional title → scrolling items (118px width, 168px height area) with centered selection, optional checkboxes above text
descriptionKo: 중앙 선택 항목이 있는 수평 스크롤 피커입니다. 단일 선택(체크박스 없음)과 다중 선택(체크박스 포함) 두 가지 모드를 지원하며, 49px 대형 텍스트와 300ms 스크롤 애니메이션을 사용합니다.
descriptionEn: Horizontal scrolling picker with centered selection item. Supports two modes: single selection (no checkbox) and multiple selection (with checkboxes). Large text (49px) for items, smooth 300ms scroll animation. Optional title at top. Centered item is focused/selected.
